full_text:
Zhou Zhong (Jiamou) 周忠 (嘉謀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Zhong (周忠), styledJiamou (嘉謀), was born in Shu county, Lujiang commandery. Urged Li Jue to call in Zhu Jun, led troops to protect Xian and had some success. Zhou Zhong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo, and Li Jue.
